ai-attach-all-open-notes.label: AI: Attach All Open Notes
ai-attach-all-open-notes.description: Attach all open notes to AI.

ai-attach-current-note.label: AI: Attach Current Note
ai-attach-current-note.description: Attach the current note to AI.

bold.label: Bold
bold.description: Toggle bold formatting for the current selection.

buy-glyph-license.label: Buy Glyph License
buy-glyph-license.description: Open the purchase page for Glyph.

collapse_all_headings.label: Collapse All Headings
collapse_all_headings.description: Collapse every heading in the current note.

copy-note-markdown.label: Copy Note as Markdown
copy-note-markdown.description: Copy the current note as markdown.

create-from-template.label: Create From Template
create-from-template.description: Create a new note from a template.

expand_all_headings.label: Expand All Headings
expand_all_headings.description: Expand every heading in the current note.

extract_selection_to_note.label: Extract to Note
extract_selection_to_note.description: Create a note from the current selection.

go-back-note.label: Go Back
go-back-note.description: Go back in the current tab's note history.

go-forward-note.label: Go Forward
go-forward-note.description: Go forward in the current tab's note history.

heading_1.label: Heading 1
heading_1.description: Convert the current block to a level 1 heading.

heading_2.label: Heading 2
heading_2.description: Convert the current block to a level 2 heading.

heading_3.label: Heading 3
heading_3.description: Convert the current block to a level 3 heading.

italic.label: Italic
italic.description: Toggle italic formatting for the current selection.

link_clear.label: Remove Link
link_clear.description: Remove the current link from the selection.

link_set.label: Insert or Edit Link
link_set.description: Insert a link or edit the current link.

move-active-file.label: Move Active File
move-active-file.description: Move the current file to a different folder.

new-note.label: New Note
new-note.description: Create a new note in the current folder.

open-daily-note.label: Open Daily Note
open-daily-note.description: Open or create today's daily note.

open-git-sync-settings.label: Open Git Sync Settings
open-git-sync-settings.description: Open the Git Sync section in settings.

open-license-settings.label: Open License Settings
open-license-settings.description: Open the license section in settings.

open-local-connections.label: Open Local Connections
open-local-connections.description: Open local connections for the current note.

open-quick-note.label: Open Quick Note
open-quick-note.description: Open the floating quick note scratchpad.

open-search-palette.label: Open Search Palette
open-search-palette.description: Open search in the command palette.

open-space-settings.label: Open Space Settings
open-space-settings.description: Open settings for the current space.

quick-open.label: Quick Open
quick-open.description: Open the command palette directly in file mode.

reveal-space.label: Reveal Space
reveal-space.description: Show the current space in the system file browser.

save-note.label: Save Note
save-note.description: Save the current note if modified.

show-welcome-note.label: Welcome Note
show-welcome-note.description: Create or open the welcome note in the root of the current space.

open-shortcuts-settings.label: Keyboard Shortcuts…
open-shortcuts-settings.description: Open the keyboard shortcuts section in settings.

open-glyph-terms.label: Terms of Service
open-glyph-terms.description: Open the Glyph terms of service.

open-glyph-github.label: GitHub
open-glyph-github.description: Open the Glyph repository on GitHub.

strikethrough.label: Strikethrough
strikethrough.description: Toggle strikethrough formatting for the current selection.

toggle-ai.label: Toggle AI Panel
toggle-ai.description: Show or hide the AI assistant panel.

toggle-note-info-sidebar.label: Toggle Note Info Sidebar
toggle-note-info-sidebar.description: Show or hide the note info sidebar.

toggle-pin-active-file.label: Pin or Unpin Current File
toggle-pin-active-file.description: Pin or unpin the active file.

toggle-sidebar.label: Toggle Sidebar
toggle-sidebar.description: Show or hide the file tree sidebar.

underline.label: Underline
underline.description: Toggle underline formatting for the current selection.

switch-to-edit.label: Rich Mode
switch-to-edit.description: Switch to the rich WYSIWYG editing mode.

switch-to-preview.label: Preview Mode
switch-to-preview.description: Switch to the read-only preview mode.

switch-to-raw.label: Raw Mode
switch-to-raw.description: Switch to the raw Markdown editing mode.
